content:
type: SPEC
files: outlines/prompts.py
spec: PROPOSAL: agent1 (me) owns outlines/prompts.py. My feature: prompt decorator accepts optional 'filters' dict param (str->Callable), supports both @prompt and @prompt(filters={...}) usage; Prompt.from_str(content, filters=None) and Prompt.from_file(path, filters=None) accept the same; new create_jinja_env(filters=None) helper centralizes jinja2.Environment construction + built-in filter registration (name/description/source/signature/schema/args) then updates env.filters with any passed-in custom filters dict; _template_from_str/_template_from_file refactored to call create_jinja_env(filters). If you confirm defer, reply with your exact desired signature/behavior for register_filter(name, fn) and unregister_filter(name) (global registry) and where in the render pipeline those global filters should be merged in (e.g. inside create_jinja_env, applied before or after the explicit filters param) so I implement it faithfully.
note: Conflict resolution: proposing agent1 owns outlines/prompts.py (we both sent CLAIM at nearly the same time). Please confirm by sending DEFER + your SPEC for register_filter/unregister_filter, and I'll implement both your registry and my filters param in the same file.
